item.description:
What's New

  • add `--json` flag to `list`, `show`, and `compare` commands
  • add mobile navigation modal
  • display full kernel architecture table on release pages
  • show device marketing names in hardware support grid
  • show device marketing names and add component browser

Fixes

  • add `actions: write` permission to release job
  • correct libexslt version extraction to use `LIBEXSLT_VERSION`
  • log warnings for silent `try?` failures
  • log actual error when hdiutil plist parsing fails
  • align CLI, app, README, and tests for Xcode product parity
  • register `ValidateCommand` in bundled CLI and remove dead code

Performance

  • enable client prerendering, queued rendering, and caching

Under the Hood

  • deduplicate macOS/Xcode pages and add about/404 pages
